ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the event image */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Whether the event is virtual or not */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the distance belongs to */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance (e.g., 5K, 10K, half-marathon) */,
  "distance_type" TEXT /* Type of distance (e.g., running, cycling, swimming) */,
  "distance_description" TEXT /* Description of the distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_distances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., running, triathlon, duathlon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant registering */,
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance being registered for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_distance_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_id") REFERENCES event_distances ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration the result belongs to */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, event organizer, participant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "event_organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event organizer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the event organizer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being organized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date of claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being analyzed */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants for the event */,
  "registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of registrations for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the option belongs to */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option (e.g., details, update, save, claim, feature) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the sponsor belongs to */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the volunteer belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the volunteer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_staff" (
  "event_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event staff */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the event staff belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event staff */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the event staff */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the event staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the donation belongs to */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of donation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount donated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
